summary: Frontend-only re-test of ARPITX landing page after Apple/Linear dark-luxury redesign (electric blue #3B82F6 on #050505). All 14 flows from the review request pass. No orange (#FF3D00 / rgb(255,61,0)) or amber (#FFB800) residue detected in any element's color/background/border across desktop or mobile. Hero, Marquee, Featured lightbox, ShortForm, Services, Process, Pricing, FAQ (single-open), Contact form (empty-validation + submit + mailto + Sent state + toast), Contact links, Footer, and mobile hamburger all function correctly.
action_items: MINOR (non-blocking): /app/frontend/src/App.js still has className bg-[#0a0a0a] (old dark) on the root wrapper. Visually overridden by body background var(--bg)=#050505 so no user impact, but change to bg-[#050505] for consistency.
MINOR (non-blocking): Hero.jsx line 23 comment still reads 'Ambient orange glow' though the gradient uses blue rgba(59,130,246). Update the comment for accuracy.
critical_code_review_comments: No orange color values remain in computed styles anywhere on the page. Grep of /app/frontend/src also shows only one stale reference: App.js bg-[#0a0a0a] wrapper (visually overridden).

Contact form correctly uses window.location.href = mailto:... — submit sets Sent state and shows sonner success toast; empty submit shows sonner error toast 'Please fill in name, email, and message.'.
Radix Dialog (hero + featured lightboxes) correctly unmounts the iframe on close (verified data-state=closed and iframe count 0 after Escape).
Mobile menu test-id is nav-mobile-toggle (not nav-hamburger as review spec assumed) — functionality works, but consider adding an alias if external tests rely on that name.

Marquee has 9 skill items as required (Adobe Premiere Pro, Adobe After Effects, Cinematic Color Grading, Motion Graphics, Sound Design, Documentary Style, YouTube Editing, Voiceover Editing, Foreign Clients Welcome) — matches spec.

verified_flows.theme: body bg = rgb(5,5,5); 0 elements with rgb(255,61,0) or rgb(255,184,0) on desktop and mobile
verified_flows.hero: Headline present, overline 'AVAILABLE FOR FREELANCE PROJECTS WORLDWIDE', both CTAs (hero-cta-portfolio, hero-cta-trial), 4 stats, floating video card with blue play button
verified_flows.nav: Logo + 6 links (WORK/SERVICES/PROCESS/PRICING/FAQ/CONTACT) + Hire Me CTA + scroll-progress bar; mobile hamburger (nav-mobile-toggle) opens overlay with all links
verified_flows.hero_lightbox: Clicking hero-video-wrap opens dialog with youtube.com/embed/UULJ3cp1pfo iframe; Escape closes and iframe unmounts
verified_flows.marquee: marquee-section renders with 9 items doubled; blue ✦ separators
verified_flows.featured: featured-section present, featured-external href = https://youtu.be/UULJ3cp1pfo, featured-play-btn opens featured-lightbox
verified_flows.shortform: reel-card-real-0 href = https://www.instagram.com/reel/DaTJbjWCHAN/; reel-card-soon-1..5 all present with 5 'IN PRODUCTION' badges
verified_flows.process: 4 steps process-step-0..3, titles 'You Send Footage / I Edit It / You Review / Upload & Go', label 'PROCESS', 'THE PROTOCOL' not present
verified_flows.pricing: 3 cards (starter/pro/bundle), prices $15/$35/$90, Pro has 'Most Popular' badge
verified_flows.faq: 6 items faq-item-0..5, section label 'FREQUENTLY ASKED', single-open behavior confirmed via aria-expanded states
verified_flows.contact_form: Empty submit -> sonner error toast 'Please fill in name, email, and message.'; project select has 5 options, budget select has 4; valid submit sets button to 'Sent' and shows success toast

context_for_next_testing_agent: Theme redesign fully verified. If future changes touch Nav.jsx, note the mobile toggle testid is nav-mobile-toggle. Location.href override for mailto interception is hard because Playwright cannot redefine window.location; verify contact submit indirectly via the 'Sent' button state + toast.
